titleZh: 新公司法修订解读：投融资法律实务视角深度透视
titleEn: Interpretation of the New Company Law Revision: An In-Depth Investment and Financing Perspective
abstractZh: 从投融资文件、出资期限、股东知情权、公司登记和上市公司治理衔接等角度，对新公司法修订进行系统梳理。
abstractEn: Provides an investment-and-financing-oriented reading of the revised Company Law, covering capital timelines, shareholder information rights, company registration, and governance implications.
